endpoints.name: Get a list of all accounts groups used by the specified client

parameters.name: $inlinecount
parameters.description: Specifies that the response to the request should include a count of the number of entries in the collection

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of entries to return from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: ClientKey
parameters.description: The client to which the account groups belong.

response_parameters.name: __count
response_parameters.description: The total count of items in the feed.

response_parameters.name: __next
response_parameters.description: The link for the next page of items in the feed.

response_parameters.name: Data
response_parameters.description: The collection of entities for this feed.

children.name: AccountGroupId
children.description: Unique ID of the account group

children.name: AccountGroupKey
children.description: Unique ID of the account group used for selection

children.name: AccountGroupName
children.description: Name of the account group, displayed to the user

children.name: AccountValueProtectionLimit
children.description: If set, this value shields the account value from going below the given limit by automatically triggering closing of positions should the limit be exceeded. A limit of zero means there is no limit.

children.name: ClientKey
children.description: Unique ID of the client.

children.name: CollateralMonitoringMode
children.description: Collateral Monitoring Mode. Null when entity is not monitored on collateral.

children.name: CollateralCreditValue
children.description: Monitoring (stop-out's) are based on collateral credit value

children.name: MaxOfCollateralCreditValueAndCollateralCreditLine
children.description: Monitoring (stop-out's) are based on collateral credit value and collateral credit line.

children.name: MarginCalculationMethod
children.description: Calculation method for assessing margin utilization.

children.name: Default
children.description: Uses Saxo exposure based margin.

children.name: JanusMarginReplication
children.description: Uses rules-based the Janus methodology to calculate margin.

children.name: SpanForFutures
children.description: Uses rules-based SPAN methods to calculate margin on futures alone.

children.name: SpanForFuturesAndOptions
children.description: Uses rules-based SPAN methods to calculate margin on futures and options.

children.name: MarginLendingEnabled
children.description: Margin Lending Enabled

children.name: No
children.description: Margin Lending is disabled.

children.name: None
children.description: Default. Margin Lending is not applicable.

children.name: Yes
children.description: Margin Lending is enabled.

children.name: MarginMonitoringMode
children.description: Margin Monitoring Mode. Null when entity is not monitored on margin.

children.name: Equity
children.description: Monitoring is based on standard equity utilization, pre-check's are done against standard equity utilization.

children.name: Lines
children.description: Monitoring (stop-out's) are based on credit line utilization, pre-check's are done against trading and credit line utilization.

children.name: Margin
children.description: Monitoring (stop-out's) are based on standard margin utilization, pre-check's are done against standard margin utilization.

children.name: PortfolioBasedMarginEnabled
children.description: Portfolio Based Margin (PBM) is a method for mapping the risk of an investment portfolio. True if enabled else false.

children.name: SupportsAccountValueProtectionLimit
children.description: If true, an AccountValueProtectionLimit may be set on this account. If it is false, the AccountValueProtectionLimit can be set on client or account group.

response_parameters.name: MaxRows
response_parameters.description: The maximum number of rows that can be returned (if applicable).

endpoints.name: Get details about a single account group

parameters.name: AccountGroupKey
parameters.description: Unique key for the account group.

parameters.name: ClientKey
parameters.description: The key of the client to which the account group belong.

response_parameters.name: AccountGroupId
response_parameters.description: Unique ID of the account group

response_parameters.name: AccountGroupKey
response_parameters.description: Unique ID of the account group used for selection

response_parameters.name: AccountGroupName

response_parameters.name: AccountValueProtectionLimit
response_parameters.description: If set, this value shields the account value from going below the given limit by automatically triggering closing of positions should the limit be exceeded. A limit of zero means there is no limit.

response_parameters.name: CollateralMonitoringMode
response_parameters.description: Collateral Monitoring Mode. Null when entity is not monitored on collateral.

children.name: CollateralCreditValue
children.description: Monitoring (stop-out's) are based on collateral credit value

children.name: MaxOfCollateralCreditValueAndCollateralCreditLine
children.description: Monitoring (stop-out's) are based on collateral credit value and collateral credit line.

response_parameters.name: MarginCalculationMethod
response_parameters.description: Calculation method for assessing margin utilization.

children.name: Default
children.description: Uses Saxo exposure based margin.

children.name: JanusMarginReplication
children.description: Uses rules-based the Janus methodology to calculate margin.

children.name: SpanForFutures
children.description: Uses rules-based SPAN methods to calculate margin on futures alone.

children.name: SpanForFuturesAndOptions
children.description: Uses rules-based SPAN methods to calculate margin on futures and options.

children.name: No
children.description: Margin Lending is disabled.

children.name: None
children.description: Default. Margin Lending is not applicable.

children.name: Yes
children.description: Margin Lending is enabled.

response_parameters.name: MarginMonitoringMode
response_parameters.description: Margin Monitoring Mode. Null when entity is not monitored on margin.

children.name: Equity
children.description: Monitoring is based on standard equity utilization, pre-check's are done against standard equity utilization.

children.name: Lines
children.description: Monitoring (stop-out's) are based on credit line utilization, pre-check's are done against trading and credit line utilization.

children.name: Margin
children.description: Monitoring (stop-out's) are based on standard margin utilization, pre-check's are done against standard margin utilization.

response_parameters.name: PortfolioBasedMarginEnabled
response_parameters.description: Portfolio Based Margin (PBM) is a method for mapping the risk of an investment portfolio. True if enabled else false.

response_parameters.name: SupportsAccountValueProtectionLimit
response_parameters.description: If true, an AccountValueProtectionLimit may be set on this account. If it is false, the AccountValueProtectionLimit can be set on client or account group.

parameters.name: AccountGroupKey
parameters.description: Unique key of the account group to change.

parameters.name: AccountValueProtectionLimit
parameters.description: If set, this value shields the account value from going below the given limit by automatically triggering closing of positions should the limit be exceeded. A limit of zero means there is no limit.

parameters.name: ClientKey
parameters.description: The key of the client to which the account group belong.
